几个月后，同样的事情再次发生。9月10日，甲骨文披露了一项为期五年、价值3000亿美元的计算能力交易，该交易将于2027年开始。甲骨文股价攀升更高，短暂地让创始人拉里·埃里森成为世界首富。这笔交易的规模之大令人震惊：OpenAI没有3000亿美元可供支出，因此这个数字预示着两家公司将实现巨大的增长，并且需要相当大的信心。

然而，在尚未花费一分钱之前，这项交易已经巩固了甲骨文作为领先人工智能基础设施提供商的地位——以及一股不容忽视的金融力量。

英伟达的投资狂潮

随着人工智能实验室争相建设基础设施，它们大多从一家公司购买GPU：英伟达。这项交易让英伟达现金充裕——它正以越来越不寻常的方式将这些现金投资回该行业。2025年9月，英伟达以50亿美元收购了竞争对手英特尔4%的股份——但更令人惊讶的是它与自己客户的交易。英特尔交易披露一周后，该公司宣布向OpenAI投资1000亿美元，这笔投资以GPU支付，这些GPU将用于OpenAI正在进行的数据中心项目。此后，英伟达宣布与埃隆·马斯克的xAI达成类似交易，OpenAI也与AMD启动了独立的GPU换股票安排。

如果这看起来像是个循环，那它确实是。英伟达的GPU之所以有价值，是因为它们非常稀缺——而通过将它们直接交易到日益膨胀的数据中心计划中，英伟达正在确保它们保持这种稀缺性。对于OpenAI的非公开股票，你也可以这么说，它的价值更高，因为它无法通过公开市场获得。目前，OpenAI和英伟达势头正盛，似乎没人过于担心——但如果这种势头开始减弱，这种安排将受到更多审查。

建设未来的超大规模数据中心

对于Meta这样已经拥有大量传统基础设施的公司来说，情况更为复杂——尽管同样昂贵。Meta首席执行官马克·扎克伯格表示，该公司计划到2028年底在美国基础设施上投入6000亿美元。

2025年上半年，该公司支出比上一年增加了300亿美元，这主要受到该公司日益增长的人工智能雄心的推动。部分支出用于大额云合同，例如最近与谷歌云达成的100亿美元交易，但更多的资源正投入到两个巨大的新数据中心。

路易斯安那州一个占地2,250英亩的新基地，被命名为“海伯利安”（Hyperion），预计将耗资100亿美元建设，并提供约5千兆瓦的计算能力。值得注意的是，该基地与当地一家核电站达成了协议，以应对增加的能源负荷。俄亥俄州一个较小的基地，名为“普罗米修斯”（Prometheus），预计将于2026年投入运营，由天然气供电。

这种规模的建设伴随着真实的环境成本。埃隆·马斯克的xAI在田纳西州南孟菲斯建造了自己的混合数据中心和发电厂。该工厂已迅速成为该县最大的烟雾生产化学品排放源之一，这归因于一系列天然气涡轮机，专家称其违反了《清洁空气法案》。

“星门”登月计划

去年一月，在唐纳德·特朗普总统第二次就职仅两天后，他宣布软银、OpenAI和甲骨文将成立一家合资企业，计划投入5000亿美元用于在美国建设人工智能基础设施。该项目以1994年电影《星际之门》命名，伴随着巨大的炒作，特朗普称其为“历史上最大的人工智能基础设施项目”。OpenAI的萨姆·奥特曼似乎表示同意，他说：“我认为这将是这个时代最重要的项目。”

概括来说，该计划是软银提供资金，甲骨文在OpenAI的协助下负责建设。这一切都由特朗普监督，他承诺清除任何可能阻碍建设的监管障碍。但从一开始就存在疑虑，包括奥特曼的商业竞争对手埃隆·马斯克，他声称该项目没有可用的资金。

随着炒作的消退，该项目失去了一些势头。8月，彭博社报道称合作伙伴未能达成共识。尽管如此，该项目仍在推进，在德克萨斯州阿比林建设了八个数据中心，其中最后一栋建筑的建设预计将于2026年底完成。

资本支出压力

“资本支出”通常是一个相当枯燥的衡量标准，指公司在实体资产上的支出。但随着科技公司纷纷公布其2026年的资本支出计划，数据中心支出的热潮使得这些数字变得更有趣——也更大。

亚马逊是资本支出领头羊，预计2026年支出2000亿美元（高于2025年的1310亿美元），谷歌紧随其后，预计在1750亿至1850亿美元之间（高于2025年的910亿美元）。Meta估计为1150亿至1350亿美元（高于前一年的710亿美元），尽管这个数字有点误导性，因为许多数据中心项目完全未在其账簿上体现。总而言之，超大规模云服务提供商计划仅在2026年就在数据中心项目上投入近7000亿美元。

这笔钱足以吓坏一些投资者。然而，这些公司大多没有被吓倒，解释说人工智能基础设施对其公司的未来至关重要。这形成了一种奇怪的动态。正如你可能预期的，科技高管对人工智能的看法比华尔街同行更为乐观——科技公司投入越多，他们的银行家就越紧张。再再加上许多公司为资助这些建设而承担的巨额债务，你就会开始听到整个硅谷的首席财务官们咬牙切齿的声音。

这尚未对人工智能支出造成影响，但很快就会——除非超大规模云服务提供商能证明这些投资能带来回报。

本文首次发表于9月22日。

title_en: Planet Fitness, Inc. (PLNT): A Bull Case Theory
title_zh: Planet Fitness 公司 (PLNT)：看涨理论
summary_zh: 对Planet Fitness (PLNT) 的看涨观点认为，其低成本、无压力健身模式成功吸引大量休闲用户。公司凭借轻资产特许经营模式实现全球快速扩张，截至2025年门店约2900家、会员2080万。新店开设与同店销售增长驱动营收利润持续增长，并产生强劲自由现金流。尽管股价近期下跌，但其可扩展性、国际市场潜力及同店销售势头仍是长期增长的核心动力。
full_text_en:
We came across a bullish thesis on Planet Fitness, Inc. on Daniel's Deep Dive’s Substack. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on PLNT. Planet Fitness, Inc.'s share was trading at $93.01 as of February 10th. PLNT’s trailing and forward P/E were 37.58 and 25.97 respectively according to Yahoo Finance.

wavebreakmedia/Shutterstock.com

Planet Fitness, Inc., together with its subsidiaries, franchises and operates fitness centers under the Planet Fitness brand. PLNT represents a compelling example of how a simple, low-cost concept can scale successfully in the highly competitive gym industry.

The company is built around affordable memberships and a non-intimidating, beginner-friendly value proposition, positioning Planet Fitness as the first stop for casual and new gym users rather than high-end fitness enthusiasts. This accessibility-driven model has enabled the company to build a broad and sticky customer base without relying on premium pricing or specialized offerings.

A core pillar of Planet Fitness’s success is its asset-light franchise model. Approximately 90% of its gyms are operated by franchisees, allowing the company to expand rapidly while maintaining low capital intensity and high returns on invested capital. By the end of 2025, Planet Fitness had grown its global footprint to roughly 2,900 locations, serving about 20.8 million active members. While the majority of clubs are located in the United States, the brand has also established an international presence across markets such as Canada, Mexico, Australia, and Spain, providing a long runway for further expansion.

Growth has been driven by a combination of new club openings and improving performance at existing locations. In 2025 alone, Planet Fitness opened more than 180 new clubs, while same-club sales increased by approximately 6.7%, reflecting healthy demand and strong unit-level economics. Over the past decade, the company has delivered revenue growth of roughly 14% annually, with profits growing even faster at about 19% per year.

Importantly, this growth has translated into robust cash generation, with free cash flow margins of around 17%. Overall, Planet Fitness demonstrates how a disciplined, low-price strategy, paired with a scalable franchise model, can create a durable, high-quality business with attractive long-term growth prospects.

Previously, we covered a bullish thesis on Planet Fitness, Inc. (PLNT) by The Elevator Pitch in May 2025, which highlighted the asset-light franchise model, HVLP positioning, market dominance, strong unit economics, and margin expansion potential. PLNT's stock price has depreciated by approximately 11.25% since our coverage. Daniel's Deep Dive shares a similar thesis but emphasizes on scalability, international expansion, same-club sales momentum, and durable free cash flow generation.
full_text_zh:
我们在Daniel's Deep Dive的Substack上看到了关于Planet Fitness公司的一篇看涨论点。本文将总结看涨方对PLNT的论点。截至2月10日，Planet Fitness公司的股价为93.01美元。根据雅虎财经数据，PLNT的TTM市盈率为37.58，远期市盈率为25.97。

wavebreakmedia/Shutterstock.com

Planet Fitness公司及其子公司以Planet Fitness品牌特许经营并运营健身中心。PLNT是一个引人注目的例子，它展示了一个简单、低成本的理念如何在竞争激烈的健身行业中成功实现规模化。

该公司围绕着价格实惠的会员资格以及不令人生畏、对初学者友好的价值主张，将Planet Fitness定位为休闲和新健身用户的首选，而非高端健身爱好者的目的地。这种以可及性为驱动的模式使公司能够建立广泛而稳定的客户群，而无需依赖高价策略或专业化服务。

Planet Fitness成功的核心支柱是其轻资产特许经营模式。大约90%的健身房由特许经营商运营，这使得公司能够迅速扩张，同时保持低资本密集度和高投资资本回报率。截至2025年底，Planet Fitness已将其全球业务扩展到大约2,900个地点，服务约2080万活跃会员。虽然大多数俱乐部位于美国，但该品牌还在加拿大、墨西哥、澳大利亚和西班牙等市场建立了国际业务，为进一步扩张提供了广阔空间。

增长是由新俱乐部开业和现有门店业绩提升共同推动的。仅在2025年，Planet Fitness就开设了超过180家新俱乐部，而同店销售额增长了约6.7%，这反映了健康的需求和强大的单店经济效益。在过去十年中，该公司实现了约14%的年收入增长，利润增长速度更快，约为每年19%。

重要的是，这种增长已转化为强劲的现金流生成能力，自由现金流利润率约为17%。总的来说，Planet Fitness展示了纪律严明的低价策略与可扩展的特许经营模式相结合，如何能够创造一个具有吸引力长期增长前景的耐用、高质量业务。

此前，我们曾在2025年5月报道了The Elevator Pitch关于Planet Fitness公司（PLNT）的看涨论点，该论点强调了其轻资产特许经营模式、高价值低价（HVLP）定位、市场主导地位、强劲的单店经济效益和利润扩张潜力。自我们报道以来，PLNT的股价已下跌约11.25%。Daniel's Deep Dive提出了一个类似的论点，但更侧重于可扩展性、国际扩张、同店销售势头和持久的自由现金流生成能力。

title_en: 6 Ways To Get Money Back From the IRS Using Tax Credits — According to a Tax Pro
title_zh: 六种方法利用税收抵免从美国国税局获得退款 — 一位税务专业人士表示
summary_zh: 报税退款取决于正确申报税收抵免，许多人因缺乏了解而错失机会。税务专家Perez指出五类主要抵免助您退税：包括儿童税收抵免（最高2000美元）、劳动所得税抵免（中低收入者）、美国教育机会税收抵免（大学学费）、保费税收抵免（医保市场购险）以及儿童和被抚养人护理抵免（日托费用）。掌握并利用这些抵免能有效降低税负或获得退款。
full_text_en:
Getting a tax refund often feels like luck, but it usually comes down to knowing which tax credits you qualify for and claiming them correctly. Tax credits can help reduce your tax bill dollar-for-dollar. Some are even refundable, meaning you could get money back from the IRS even if you don’t owe any taxes.

GOBankingRates spoke to David A. Perez, a tax professional and founder of Tax Maverick, who said many people miss out on tax credits because they don’t understand how they work or if they qualify. He shared five ways you may be able to get money back from the IRS using tax credits.

1. Child Tax Credit

Families with kids under the age of 17 may qualify for a non-refundable Child Tax Credit (CTC) and Additional Child Tax Credit (ACTC), a refundable part of the CTC. “It’s normally $2,000 per child,” Perez said. In addition, “There’s an ACTC, which could be a refundable credit up to $1,700 per qualifying child for 2025.”

Read More: 5 Tax Loopholes the Ultra-Wealthy Use That Most Americans Don’t Know About

Explore Next: 5 Low-Effort Ways To Make Passive Income (You Can Start This Week)

2. Earned Income Tax Credit

The Earned Income Tax Credit (EITC) is common for low- to moderate-income earners.

“It’s based on family size and income,” said Perez. “This can be a big refund for somebody. I mean, typically this is like $6,000 – $7,000 that you could get back in a refund if you qualify.”

To qualify, you must have earned not more than $11,950 in investment income in 2025. And if you’re working, the income ranges from $19,104 for singles with no children to $68,675 for married couples filing jointly with three or more children.

3. American Opportunity Tax Credit

If you or your child are in college, education credits can reduce what you owe in taxes or get a partial refund. Your modified adjusted gross income must not be more than $90,000 and $180,000 or less for married filing jointly.

“American Opportunity Tax Credit is a credit for those first four years in college. It’s up to $2,500, and $1,000 of that $2,500 could be a refundable credit,” said Perez. And if you’re still continuing your education past the four years, Perez says you can use the lifetime learning credit, which is nonrefundable.

4. Premium Tax Credit

If you purchase health insurance through the Health Insurance Marketplace, you may qualify for a Premium Tax Credit. Perez describes it as “a credit used to apply to the health care that is obtained through the marketplace, which is the Affordable Care Act.”

5. Child and Dependent Care Credit

Childcare is expensive. That’s why the government put in place a tax code that offers some relief. This means you could get credit for sending your children to daycare. “The Child and Dependent Care Credit is for daycare for children under 13 years old or over 13 if they’re disabled,” said Perez.
full_text_zh:
获得退税通常感觉像是运气，但这通常取决于你是否知道自己符合哪些税收抵免条件并正确申报。税收抵免可以一比一地帮助减少你的税单。有些甚至是可退还的，这意味着即使你不欠任何税款，美国国税局（IRS）也可能退还你一部分钱。

GOBankingRates采访了税务专业人士、Tax Maverick创始人大卫·A·佩雷斯（David A. Perez），他表示，许多人错过了税收抵免，因为他们不了解其运作方式或自己是否符合条件。他分享了五种你可以利用税收抵免从美国国税局获得退款的方式。

1. 儿童税收抵免

有17岁以下子女的家庭可能有资格获得不可退还的儿童税收抵免（CTC）和可退还的儿童附加税收抵免（ACTC），后者是儿童税收抵免的可退还部分。佩雷斯说：“通常每个孩子可抵免2,000美元。”此外，“还有一项儿童附加税收抵免，2025年符合条件的儿童每人最高可退还1,700美元。”

阅读更多：超级富豪使用的5个大多数美国人不知道的税收漏洞

探索下一个：5种低投入获得被动收入的方法（本周即可开始）

2. 劳动所得税收抵免

劳动所得税收抵免（EITC）对于中低收入者来说很常见。

佩雷斯说：“这取决于家庭规模和收入。”“这对于某些人来说可能是一笔巨额退税。我的意思是，如果你符合条件，通常可以退还6,000到7,000美元。”

要符合资格，2025年的投资收入不得超过11,950美元。如果你正在工作，收入范围从无子女单身的19,104美元到有三个或以上子女的已婚共同申报的68,675美元。

3. 美国机会税收抵免

如果你或你的孩子正在上大学，教育抵免可以减少你所欠的税款或获得部分退款。你的调整后总收入（MAGI）对于单身人士不得超过90,000美元，对于已婚共同申报者不得超过180,000美元。

佩雷斯说：“美国机会税收抵免是针对大学前四年的抵免。最高可达2,500美元，其中1,000美元可能是可退还的抵免。”如果你在四年后仍在继续深造，佩雷斯表示你可以使用终身学习抵免，这是不可退还的。

4. 保费税收抵免

如果你通过健康保险市场购买健康保险，你可能有资格获得保费税收抵免。佩雷斯将其描述为“用于抵免通过市场（即《平价医疗法案》）获得的医疗保健费用的一种抵免。”

5. 子女和被抚养人护理抵免

育儿费用昂贵。这就是为什么政府制定了提供一定减免的税法。这意味着你可以因送孩子去日托而获得抵免。佩雷斯说：“子女和被抚养人护理抵免适用于13岁以下儿童，或13岁以上但有残疾儿童的日托费用。”

title_en: Life Time Group Holdings, Inc. (LTH): A Bull Case Theory
title_zh: 生命时间集团控股公司 (LTH)：看涨论点
summary_zh: 市场看好Life Time Group Holdings (LTH)，因其在美加提供一站式高端健康、健身及康养服务的独特大型综合俱乐部模式。公司不追求门店快速扩张，而是专注于通过提升会员定价、利用率及附加消费，最大化约170家现有门店的效益。该策略精准瞄准高收入客群，推动过去三年营收增长近19.4%，利润率显著提升，彰显其在利基市场的强大竞争优势和定价权。在细分健身市场中，LTH通过提供深度体验来获取盈利，区别于注重可负担性的低成本健身房。
full_text_en:
We came across a bullish thesis on Life Time Group Holdings, Inc. on Daniel's Deep Dive’s Substack. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on LTH. Life Time Group Holdings, Inc.'s share was trading at $29.86 as of February 10th. LTH’s trailing and forward P/E were 23.33 and 20.88 respectively according to Yahoo Finance.

Procter & Gamble (PG) Stock "Just Won't Quit," Says Jim Cramer

Regions with a high quality of life, including safety and healthcare, often become a magnet for new residents.

Life Time Group Holdings, Inc. provides health, fitness, and wellness experiences to a community of individual members in the United States and Canada. LTH represents a differentiated strategy within the fitness and wellness landscape, operating firmly in the premium segment with a focus on large, comprehensive clubs across the US and Canada. Unlike traditional gyms, Life Time facilities integrate expansive training areas with pools, tennis courts, group classes, spa offerings, and broader lifestyle services, positioning the brand as an all-in-one wellness destination rather than a simple workout venue.

Instead of pursuing aggressive unit expansion, the company prioritizes maximizing the productivity of its roughly 170 existing locations. Growth is driven by higher membership pricing, improved utilization rates, and increased ancillary spending per member, reflecting a model built on depth of engagement rather than rapid geographic scale.

This strategy targets a higher-income demographic and has translated into tangible financial results, with revenue increasing approximately 19.4% over the past three years alongside meaningful margin expansion, suggesting competitive advantages and pricing power within its niche. Viewed within the broader industry context, the fitness market now spans a wide spectrum of concepts, ranging from low-cost gyms serving price-sensitive customers to premium, experience-driven platforms like Life Time that cater to affluent, lifestyle-oriented members.

For new entrants, however, the value proposition remains highly personal. While the premium offering is compelling, a beginner focused on building consistency may gravitate toward a simpler, low-cost option that meets basic needs without a significant financial commitment. This contrast underscores the industry’s segmentation: premium operators monetize engagement and experience, while budget chains compete on accessibility and affordability, each addressing distinct customer priorities within a diversified market landscape.

Previously, we covered a bullish thesis on Xponential Fitness, Inc. (XPOF) by Inflexio Research in February 2025, which highlighted the company’s restructuring after governance concerns, strong franchise pipeline, international expansion plans, and significant free cash flow potential. XPOF's stock price has depreciated by approximately 50.49% since our coverage. Inflexio Research shares an identical but emphasizes on the same growth drivers and valuation upside.
full_text_zh:
我们是在Daniel's Deep Dive的Substack上看到一篇关于Life Time Group Holdings, Inc.的看涨论点。在本文中，我们将总结看涨者对LTH的论点。截至2月10日，Life Time Group Holdings, Inc.的股价为29.86美元。根据雅虎财经的数据，LTH的市盈率（TTM）和预期市盈率分别为23.33和20.88。

吉姆·克莱默称宝洁（PG）股价“就是不跌”

拥有高生活质量的地区，包括安全和医疗保健，通常会成为新居民的磁石。

Life Time Group Holdings, Inc.为美国和加拿大的个人会员社区提供健康、健身和康体体验。LTH在健身和康体领域中代表着一种差异化战略，它坚定地运营在高端市场，专注于在美国和加拿大各地的大型综合性俱乐部。与传统健身房不同，Life Time设施将广阔的训练区与游泳池、网球场、团体课程、水疗服务以及更广泛的生活方式服务相结合，将该品牌定位为一个全方位的康体目的地，而不仅仅是一个简单的健身场所。

该公司没有追求积极的单位扩张，而是优先考虑最大化其约170个现有地点的生产力。增长是由更高的会员定价、提高的利用率和每个会员增加的附带消费所驱动的，这反映了一种建立在深度参与而非快速地理扩张基础上的模式。

这一战略瞄准了高收入人群，并已转化为切实的财务业绩，过去三年收入增长约19.4%，同时利润率显著提高，这表明其在细分市场中具有竞争优势和定价权。从更广阔的行业背景来看，健身市场现在涵盖了广泛的概念，从服务于价格敏感客户的低成本健身房，到迎合富裕、注重生活方式的会员的高端、体验驱动型平台，如Life Time。

然而，对于新用户来说，价值主张仍然高度个性化。虽然高端产品引人注目，但专注于培养锻炼习惯的初学者可能会倾向于更简单、低成本的选择，在无需大量财务投入的情况下满足基本需求。这种对比突显了行业的细分：高端运营商通过参与度和体验获利，而经济型连锁店则在可及性和负担能力上竞争，各自在多元化的市场格局中满足不同的客户优先事项。

此前，我们在2025年2月曾报道了Inflexio Research对Xponential Fitness, Inc. (XPOF)的看涨论点，该论点强调了公司在治理问题后的重组、强大的特许经营渠道、国际扩张计划以及巨大的自由现金流潜力。自我们报道以来，XPOF的股价已贬值约50.49%。Inflexio Research持有相同观点，但强调了相同的增长动力和估值上行空间。

title_en: Celanese Corporation (CE): A Bull Case Theory
title_zh: 塞拉尼斯公司 (CE): 看涨论点
summary_zh: Celanese (CE) 曾因行业逆风和高价收购股价大跌。但看涨者认为，市场对其需求疲软、产能过剩及高债务的担忧被夸大。公司盈利历史稳健，2025年预计自由现金流可观，并正积极去杠杆。随着汽车、房地产等行业复苏，需求将回升，产能削减也将改善供需。CE作为深度价值周期股，股价有望翻倍。
full_text_en:
We came across a bullish thesis on Celanese Corporation on Hidden Rock Capital's Newsletter’s Substack by Hidden Rock Capital. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on CE. Celanese Corporation's share was trading at $58.32 as of February 10th. CE’s trailing and forward P/E were 7.36 and 10.24 respectively according to Yahoo Finance.

Copyright: dolgachov / 123RF Stock Photo

Celanese Corporation, a chemical and specialty materials company, manufactures and sells engineered polymers worldwide. CE has faced a difficult period over the past several years, with chemical sector headwinds—including low demand, slower GDP growth, and excess global capacity—compounded by the company’s $11 billion acquisition of Dupont’s Mobility & Materials business in 2022 at the peak of the cycle. This combination has driven Celanese’s stock down over 60% in five years, creating significant market pessimism.

Despite these challenges, Celanese has consistently generated adjusted earnings between $9 and $10 per share historically, excluding outlier years, and is projected to produce $700–$800 million in free cash flow in 2025 even in a weak demand environment. Applying historical P/E multiples of 10–12x, this suggests a base-case stock target of $90–$120 per share, more than double the current ~$50 price.

The market’s concerns around weak chemical demand, excess supply, and high debt are overstated. Demand is expected to recover in 2026–2027 as auto and housing sectors rebound and global supply chains stabilize, while ongoing capacity rationalization—including industry-wide plant closures and Celanese’s own Belgium acetate tow shutdown—should tighten supply and improve margins. The company has actively addressed its debt, using divestitures, free cash flow, and refinancing to reduce near-term obligations, with net debt projected to fall from $11.4 billion at Q3 2025 to under $9 billion by 2027, eliminating the perceived financial risk.

Looking ahead, Celanese’s stock could appreciate as fundamentals improve and debt overhang diminishes, with polyethylene price trends already signaling early signs of recovery. Technical indicators show momentum building above the 200-day moving average, suggesting potential near-term upside. Overall, Celanese represents a deep-value cyclical opportunity with a compelling risk/reward profile, positioned to more than double as industry conditions normalize and operational and financial catalysts play out.

Previously, we covered a bullish thesis on Celanese Corporation (CE) by Kyler Johnson in November 2024, which highlighted the company’s resilient Engineered Materials and Acetyl Chain segments, the path to managing debt after the Dupont M&M acquisition, and upside potential as manufacturing activity recovers. CE’s stock price has depreciated by approximately 23.76% since our coverage due to weak chemical demand, excess supply, and high debt. Hidden Rock Capital shares a similar perspective but emphasizes normalized free cash flow, sector recovery, and valuation upside as key drivers for the stock.
full_text_zh:
我们从Hidden Rock Capital的通讯Substack上看到了Hidden Rock Capital关于塞拉尼斯公司（Celanese Corporation）的看涨论点。在本文中，我们将总结看涨者对CE的论点。截至2月10日，塞拉尼斯公司的股价为58.32美元。根据雅虎财经数据，CE的市盈率（滚动）和市盈率（预期）分别为7.36和10.24。

版权：dolgachov / 123RF 图库照片

塞拉尼斯公司是一家化学和特种材料公司，在全球范围内生产和销售工程聚合物。在过去几年中，CE面临着一个困难时期，化学行业逆风—包括需求低迷、GDP增长放缓以及全球产能过剩—再加上公司在2022年周期高峰期以110亿美元收购杜邦的移动与材料业务，这使得情况更加复杂。这些因素共同导致塞拉尼斯公司股价在五年内下跌了60%以上，造成了显著的市场悲观情绪。

尽管面临这些挑战，塞拉尼斯公司（不包括异常年份）历史上一直保持每股9至10美元的调整后收益，并且预计即使在需求疲软的环境下，2025年也能产生7亿至8亿美元的自由现金流。若按历史市盈率10-12倍计算，这表明其基本股价目标为每股90-120美元，是当前约50美元价格的两倍多。

市场对化学品需求疲软、供应过剩和高负债的担忧被夸大了。随着汽车和住房行业的反弹以及全球供应链的稳定，预计需求将在2026-2027年恢复；同时，持续的产能合理化——包括全行业工厂关闭和塞拉尼斯在比利时醋酸纤维丝束业务的关闭——应会收紧供应并改善利润。该公司已积极解决其债务问题，利用资产剥离、自由现金流和再融资来减少近期债务，预计净债务将从2025年第三季度的114亿美元降至2027年的90亿美元以下，从而消除被感知的财务风险。

展望未来，随着基本面改善和债务积压减少，塞拉尼斯公司的股价可能会上涨，聚乙烯价格趋势已发出复苏的早期信号。技术指标显示，股价已在200日移动平均线上方形成动能，预示着短期内可能上涨。总体而言，塞拉尼斯代表了一个具有吸引力的风险/回报特征的深度价值周期性机会，随着行业状况正常化以及运营和财务催化剂的发挥作用，其股价有望翻倍以上。

此前，我们在2024年11月报道了Kyler Johnson对塞拉尼斯公司（CE）的看涨论点，该论点强调了公司有韧性的工程材料和醋酸链业务部门、杜邦移动与材料业务收购后管理债务的路径，以及随着制造业活动复苏而带来的上涨潜力。自我们报道以来，由于化学品需求疲软、供应过剩和高负债，CE的股价已贬值约23.76%。Hidden Rock Capital持有相似的观点，但强调将正常化自由现金流、行业复苏和估值上涨作为股价的关键驱动因素。

title_en: Gartner, Inc. (IT): A Bull Case Theory
title_zh: Gartner公司（IT）：看涨理论
summary_zh: 英文新闻看好Gartner公司，核心在于其在决策智能平台（DIP）市场的作用。Gartner首次发布DIP魔力象限报告，将DIP正式定义为一种整合数据、分析、AI和人类判断，端到端管理决策的软件，并将其提升为运营资产。报告预测，到2030年，明确建模的业务决策将更受信赖且效率更高，凸显结构化决策在AI时代的重要性。DIP能帮助企业将AI洞察转化为可靠行动，降低风险，加速决策并提升透明度。Gartner报告中DIP领域的领导者，预计将因市场采纳加速而营收增长，为投资者带来战略和财务上的看涨机会。
full_text_en:
We came across a bullish thesis on Gartner, Inc. on MarTech Square’s Substack’s Substack by MarTech Square. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on IT. Gartner, Inc.'s share was trading at $159.89 as of February 10th. IT’s trailing and forward P/E were 16.45 and 12.08, respectively according to Yahoo Finance.

D-Wave Quantum (QBTS) Gets 20% Boost on Expected Business Updates

Charts on the computer

Gartner, Inc. operates as a research and advisory company in the United States, Canada, Europe, the Middle East, Africa, and internationally. IT’s Gartner’s inaugural Magic Quadrant for Decision Intelligence Platforms (DIP) highlights a transformative opportunity in enterprise decision-making. The report formalizes a market that has existed informally for years, positioning decisions as operational assets rather than byproducts of dashboards and meetings.

Decision Intelligence Platforms are defined as software that enables organizations to design, execute, monitor, and govern decisions end to end, combining data, analytics, AI, rules, and human judgment. Gartner predicts that by 2030, explicitly modeled business decisions will be five times more trusted and 80% faster than ungoverned ones, underscoring the growing importance of structured decisioning in an AI-driven world.

The Magic Quadrant evaluates vendors on their ability to manage the full decision lifecycle—modeling, orchestration, monitoring, and governance—addressing a key gap as organizations scale AI: turning insight into reliable action while maintaining accountability. Companies that lead in this space are likely to capture significant market share as enterprises seek tools to operationalize insights, reduce risk, and accelerate decision-making. The emphasis on governance and transparency makes these platforms essential for organizations concerned about black-box AI decisions.

As data and analytics leaders increasingly prioritize actionable outcomes over raw insight, Decision Intelligence Platforms are well-positioned to become a critical part of enterprise technology stacks. Vendors recognized as leaders in Gartner’s DIP Magic Quadrant are therefore likely to see accelerating adoption, driving revenue growth and creating a compelling investment case for stakeholders who anticipate the broader shift from data collection to decision-centric operations. Overall, the emergence of DIPs represents a bullish opportunity for the category’s top players, with both strategic and financial upside as the market matures.

Previously, we covered a bullish thesis on Gartner, Inc. (IT) by Bulls On Parade in March 2025, which highlighted its dominance in research and advisory services, subscription-based revenue resilience, and disciplined capital allocation. IT’s stock price has depreciated by approximately 62.79% since our coverage. MarTech Square shares a similar bullish perspective but emphasizes Gartner’s role in legitimizing Decision Intelligence Platforms and AI-driven decisioning as a growth catalyst.
full_text_zh:
我们偶然在MarTech Square的Substack上发现了一篇关于高德纳公司（Gartner, Inc.）的看涨报告。在本文中，我们将总结看涨者对高德纳的论点。截至2月10日，高德纳公司的股票交易价格为159.89美元。根据雅虎财经数据，其追踪市盈率和预期市盈率分别为16.45和12.08。

D-Wave Quantum (QBTS) 因预期业务更新获得20%提振

电脑上的图表

高德纳公司（Gartner, Inc.）在美国、加拿大、欧洲、中东、非洲和国际范围内作为一家研究和咨询公司运营。高德纳的首个决策智能平台（DIP）魔力象限报告凸显了企业决策中的变革性机遇。该报告将一个多年来非正式存在的市场正式化，将决策定位为运营资产，而非仪表板和会议的副产品。

决策智能平台被定义为一种软件，它通过结合数据、分析、人工智能、规则和人类判断，使组织能够端到端地设计、执行、监控和管理决策。高德纳预测，到2030年，明确建模的业务决策将比不受控的决策获得五倍的信任并提高80%的速度，这突显了在人工智能驱动的世界中结构化决策日益增长的重要性。

魔力象限评估了供应商管理整个决策生命周期（建模、编排、监控和治理）的能力，弥补了组织在扩展人工智能时的一个关键空白：将洞察转化为可靠行动，同时保持问责制。随着企业寻求将洞察转化为实际操作、降低风险和加速决策的工具，在该领域处于领先地位的公司可能会占据显著的市场份额。对治理和透明度的强调使得这些平台对于关注“黑箱”人工智能决策的组织至关重要。

随着数据和分析领导者越来越优先考虑可执行的成果而非原始洞察，决策智能平台具备成为企业技术堆栈关键组成部分的良好条件。因此，在高德纳DIP魔力象限中被认定为领导者的供应商可能会看到采用加速，推动收入增长，并为那些预期从数据收集转向以决策为中心运营的利益相关者创造一个引人注目的投资案例。总体而言，DIP的出现代表了该类别顶级参与者的看涨机会，随着市场成熟，具有战略和财务两方面的上行空间。

此前，我们在2025年3月报道了Bulls On Parade关于高德纳公司（IT）的看涨报告，该报告强调了其在研究和咨询服务中的主导地位、订阅式收入的韧性以及审慎的资本配置。自我们报道以来，高德纳的股价已贬值约62.79%。MarTech Square持类似的看涨观点，但强调高德纳在使决策智能平台和人工智能驱动决策合法化方面作为增长催化剂的作用。

title_en: Former Highguard level designer suggests "sweaty" competitive 3v3 play "was the biggest thing that turned a lot of players off"
title_zh: 前《Highguard》关卡设计师称，“累人的”竞技3v3玩法“是让许多玩家流失的最大原因”
summary_en:
A level designer laid off from Highguard developer Wildlight believes the free-to-play shooter's difficulties stem from having "leaned too far into the competitive scene".

Read more
summary_zh: 《Highguard》前关卡设计师Alex Graner指出，游戏失败主因是过度偏向竞技，尤其主打3v3模式。这导致游戏对玩家沟通、团队协作及操作技巧要求极高，规则复杂，令休闲玩家难适应，缺乏固定队友者迅速流失。游戏上线两周后，腾讯即撤回对开发商Wildlight的资金支持，引发大规模裁员。腾讯在该项目中的参与曾被保密，其撤资直接终结了《Highguard》的困境。
full_text_en:
A level designer laid off from Highguard developer Wildlight believes the free-to-play shooter's difficulties stem from having "leaned too far into the competitive scene".

Acknowledging that the "really big spotlight" placed on the game following its reveal at The Game Awards additionally added pressure, senior level designer Alex Graner talked candidly on the Quad Damage podcast about the "constantly evolv[ing]" game, suggesting that his "biggest fear [came] when [the studio] decided to go full-in on 3v3".

"I can only speak to my side of it as a level designer, but when I joined [Wildlight], it was trying to figure out this new, ambitious game, and this team is always pushing the boundaries," he said, as transcribed by PCGN. "You don't strive to create something that doesn't work out, but it happens, unfortunately. Throughout development, we really leaned into the competitive side of it, and that was always one of my biggest fears as a player.

"3v3 duos is always the sweatiest version of anything like battle royale, objective modes, wingman, you know it, you name it," he added. "It requires such a high intensity of communication with your team, and team play, that it doesn't leave much room for casualness. I think that was the biggest thing that turned a lot of players off Highguard."

Graner said Apex Legends came just as battle royales were a "kind of an up-and-coming mode" and was "really easy to understand after you played one game", which is why it was so successful. Conversely, Highguard was a little more complex.

"Highguard has all these different rules and stages, it's like, 'Oh, you want to loot, now we've got to chase this objective, now we have to plant this objective, now it's overtime… It has all these rules, which I think works at a really high level, but when players are first coming in it's a lot to grasp," he admitted.

"On top of all that, because it was 3v3, that kind of game just requires high-skill movement and shooting, which is already a pretty high [bar to] entry as well. So if you just have a few bad games or your teammates aren't sticking together, you're just going to get rolled, and it's very hard to 1v2 in our game.

"It's all designed to be a team-based shooter. I think that was the biggest thing. People just kind of turned it off because they didn't have the team."

Just yesterday (27th February), a new report alleged that Tencent pulled funding from developer Wildlight just two weeks after the game's launch. Staff were called to an all-hands meeting, and then told that there would be layoffs as Tencent had pulled funding as Highguard had seemingly failed to meet whatever metrics Tencent had for it.

Wildlight publicly confirmed layoffs a day later but wouldn't specify numbers, and it insisted "a core group of developers" remained to work on the game. It's thought fewer than 20 people remain at Wildlight today.

Tencent's role in Highguard's development was, curiously, kept quiet. It wasn't until several days after the layoffs that Game File confirmed Tencent's involvement. The reason for the secrecy around the company's involvement is unclear.
full_text_zh:
一名被Highguard开发商Wildlight裁员的关卡设计师认为，这款免费射击游戏的困境源于其“过于偏向竞技场景”。

高级关卡设计师亚历克斯·格拉纳尔在Quad Damage播客上坦率地谈到了这款“不断进化”的游戏，承认该游戏在游戏大奖上亮相后获得的“巨大关注”也增加了压力，并表示他“最大的担忧[产生于]当[工作室]决定全力投入3v3模式时”。

“我只能从我作为一名关卡设计师的角度谈论这件事，但当我加入[Wildlight]时，它正试图弄清楚这款新的、雄心勃勃的游戏，而且这个团队总是在突破界限，”他说道，PCGN转录了他的话。“你不会努力创造一些失败的东西，但不幸的是，它确实发生了。在整个开发过程中，我们确实非常偏向竞技方面，而这作为一名玩家，一直是我最大的担忧之一。”

“3v3双排总是任何诸如大逃杀、目标模式、僚机等游戏中最‘肝’的版本，你知道的，不胜枚举，”他补充道。“它要求你的团队之间有如此高强度的沟通和团队合作，以至于没有多少休闲空间。我认为这是让很多玩家对Highguard望而却步的最大原因。”

格拉纳尔表示，Apex Legends在大逃杀“正处于一种新兴模式”时出现，并且“玩一局之后就非常容易理解”，这就是它如此成功的原因。相反，Highguard则稍微复杂一些。

“Highguard有所有这些不同的规则和阶段，就像，‘哦，你想搜刮，现在我们必须追逐这个目标，现在我们必须安放这个目标，现在是加时赛……’它有所有这些规则，我认为这在非常高的水平上是有效的，但当玩家刚开始玩的时候，要掌握的东西太多了，”他承认。

“最重要的是，因为它是一个3v3游戏，这类游戏要求高技能的移动和射击，这本身就已经是一个相当高的入门[门槛]了。所以如果你只是玩了几局糟糕的游戏，或者你的队友不团结，你就会被碾压，而且在我们的游戏中1v2是非常困难的。”

“它完全被设计成一个团队射击游戏。我认为这是最大的问题。人们之所以放弃，只是因为他们没有团队。”

就在昨天（2月27日），一份新报告声称，腾讯在该游戏上线仅两周后就撤回了对开发商Wildlight的资金。员工被召集参加了一次全体会议，随后被告知将进行裁员，因为腾讯已撤资，Highguard似乎未能达到腾讯为其设定的任何指标。

Wildlight在一天后公开证实了裁员，但未说明具体人数，并坚称“核心开发团队”仍留在公司继续开发游戏。据估计，目前Wildlight的员工人数不足20人。

奇怪的是，腾讯在Highguard开发中的角色一直被保密。直到裁员几天后，Game File才证实腾讯的参与。该公司参与的保密原因尚不清楚。

title_en: Doom: The Dark Ages' DLC is so big, it's "basically like a sequel"
title_zh: 毁灭战士：黑暗时代 的DLC内容庞大，"基本上堪比一部续作"
summary_en:
Doom: The Dark Ages' DLC is so big, it's "basically like a sequel".

Read more
summary_zh: 《毁灭战士：黑暗时代》游戏总监雨果·马丁透露，即将推出的DLC内容“巨大无比”，简直“就像一部续作”。他理解玩家等待已久，承诺带来“大量全新内容”。马丁强调，这款DLC将“与主游戏截然不同”，甚至可能包含一种类似长矛的新武器，暗示玩家将体验到与主游戏迥异的玩法。同时，《毁灭战士：黑暗时代》本身作为id Software史上最成功的发布之一，玩家数量已突破300万，达到此数字的速度是《毁灭战士：永恒》的七倍。
full_text_en:
Doom: The Dark Ages' DLC is so big, it's "basically like a sequel".

Talking on the Slayers Club livestream, game director Hugo Martin said that while he understands that "it's been a while since we shipped the main game", players will be rewarded for their patience with "a ton of new stuff".

"It's massive. It's so big," he said (thanks, GR+). "I know it's been a while since we've shipped the main game and you're waiting for the DLC, but just know that it's freaking huge. It's basically a sequel. That's what it feels like. It's just ginormous. I love that."

As for what's coming in that update? Well, Martin was a little more coy about that, but we did learn that the DLC is "nothing like" the main game, and could boast a spear-like weapon.

"The DLC is nothing like this," Martin said as he played the main game on the stream. "I can't say too much, I'm just going to say that what I've been playing… I haven't been playing like this."

Doom: The Dark Ages was the "biggest launch" in id Software's history, with three million players making their way into the fiery pits of hell since the game's release. To put that into more context, Bethesda says Doom: The Dark Ages reached this number seven times faster than Doom Eternal.

"As a parent, the game I'm most concerned about these days is probably something like Roblox. By contrast, Doom feels like an entirely known and understood entity. Let's savour it," we wrote in Eurogamer's Doom: The Dark Ages review. "Here's a slice of pure gaming charisma that has come to us, unfrazzled, from a more innocent time."
full_text_zh:
《毁灭战士：黑暗时代》的DLC内容庞大，“基本上就像一部续作”。

在Slayers Club直播中，游戏总监雨果·马丁表示，尽管他明白“距离我们发布主游戏已经有一段时间了”，但玩家的耐心将获得“海量新内容”的回报。

“它太大了。它非常大，”他说（感谢GR+）。“我知道距离我们发布主游戏已经有一段时间了，你们都在等待DLC，但请务必知道它非常庞大。它基本上就是一部续作。感觉就是这样。它简直是巨无霸。我喜欢这个。”

至于这次更新会带来什么？嗯，马丁对此略显含糊，但我们确实得知这款DLC“完全不像”主游戏，并且可能会有一把类似长矛的武器。

“这个DLC完全不像这样，”马丁在直播中玩主游戏时说道。“我不能说太多，我只能说我一直在玩的东西……我玩的不是这样的。”

《毁灭战士：黑暗时代》是id Software历史上“最盛大的发布”，自游戏发售以来，已有三百万玩家深入地狱的烈火深渊。为了提供更多背景信息，Bethesda表示《毁灭战士：黑暗时代》达到这一数字的速度是《毁灭战士：永恒》的七倍。

“作为一名家长，如今我最担心的游戏可能是像《Roblox》这样的。相比之下，《毁灭战士》感觉是一个完全已知且被理解的实体。让我们好好品味它吧，”我们在Eurogamer对《毁灭战士：黑暗时代》的评论中写道。“这是一片纯粹的游戏魅力，它未经磨损，从一个更纯真的时代来到我们身边。”

title_en: Bluepoint pitched a Bloodborne remake, but FromSoftware turned it down, not Sony
title_zh: Bluepoint曾提议重制《血源》，但被FromSoftware而非索尼拒绝。
summary_en:
Just days after Sony decided to close remake masters Bluepoint Games, a new report claims that wasn't PlayStation itself that stonewalled the idea of a Bloodborne remake by Bluepoint, but developer FromSoftware.

Read more
summary_zh: 索尼近日关闭了Bluepoint Games工作室。据报告，Bluepoint曾提议重制《血源》，但遭FromSoftware拒绝。FromSoftware虽认可重制财务可行，但因宫崎英高不愿他人触碰该作而否决。在此之后，Bluepoint向索尼提交的《旺达与巨像》更新及《对马岛之魂》衍生作提案，也因资源顾虑被否。最终，Bluepoint关闭，《血源》重制计划未能实现。
full_text_en:
Just days after Sony decided to close remake masters Bluepoint Games, a new report claims that wasn't PlayStation itself that stonewalled the idea of a Bloodborne remake by Bluepoint, but developer FromSoftware.

Despite calling Bluepoint Games "an incredibly talented team" full of "technical expertise" which has "delivered exceptional experiences for the PlayStation community", Sony shut down the studio last week, impacting around 70 employees. At the time, a spokesperson said the decision was made "following a recent business review".

Sony - which acquired Bluepoint in 2021 - put the studio to work on a live-service God of War game, a project it ultimately cancelled last year, after Bluepoint released Demon's Souls as a launch exclusive for the PS5 in 2020. It was always hoped that Bluepoint would, at some point, be instructed to do the same for Bloodborne.

Now, a new report by Bloomberg claims that Bluepoint did, in fact, approach FromSoft in early 2025, pitching a remake of the 2015 game. It's said that "the studio was told that the numbers made sense, but FromSoftware didn't want it to happen".

Interestingly, former president of Sony Interactive Entertainment Shuhei Yoshida posited the same this time last year, saying: "Bloodborne is one of the most popular asks on my Twitter/X. And the people wonder why we haven't really done anything... it should be easy, right?

"Miyazaki-san really, really loved Bloodborne, what he created. So I think he is interested but he's so successful and he's so busy, so he cannot do it himself, and he doesn't want anyone else to touch it."

After this rejection, Bluepoint allegedly pitched an updated version of its Shadow of the Colossus remake to Sony, as well as a Ghost of Tsushima spin-off, but these ideas were also turned down, with Bloomberg suggesting that other studios were "concerned about dedicating significant resources to another team's project".

Bloodborne has long been considered one of the greatest games ever made. We gave it an Essential, writing: " it will be a painfully long time until I play anything else that matches up to Bloodborne's breadth of vision, generosity of content, and - yes - genius".
full_text_zh:
就在索尼决定关闭重制大师Bluepoint Games几天后，一份新报告称，阻止Bluepoint重制《血源》想法的并非PlayStation本身，而是开发商FromSoftware。

尽管曾称Bluepoint Games是“一支极具天赋的团队”，拥有“技术专长”，并“为PlayStation社区带来了卓越的体验”，索尼仍在上周关闭了该工作室，影响了大约70名员工。当时，一位发言人表示，这一决定是“在近期业务审查后”做出的。

索尼（于2021年收购Bluepoint）曾让该工作室开发一款《战神》系列服务型游戏，但该项目最终于去年取消；此前，Bluepoint曾于2020年发布了作为PS5首发独占游戏的《恶魔之魂》。人们一直希望Bluepoint有朝一日也能为《血源》做同样的事情。

现在，彭博社的一份新报告称，Bluepoint确曾在2025年初与FromSoft接触，提出了重制这款2015年游戏的想法。据称，“该工作室被告知从数据上看是合理的，但FromSoftware不希望它发生。”

有趣的是，索尼互动娱乐前总裁吉田修平去年此时也提出了同样的观点，他说：“《血源》是我Twitter/X上最常被问到的游戏之一。人们想知道为什么我们没有做任何事情……这应该很容易，对吧？”

“宫崎先生非常非常喜欢《血源》，喜欢他所创造的一切。所以我认为他很感兴趣，但他太成功也太忙了，所以他无法亲自去做，他也不希望其他人触碰它。”

在这次被拒绝之后，据称Bluepoint向索尼提出了其《旺达与巨像》重制版的更新版本，以及《对马岛之魂》的衍生作品，但这些想法也遭到了拒绝，彭博社暗示，其他工作室“不愿将大量资源投入到另一个团队的项目中”。

《血源》长期以来被认为是史上最伟大的游戏之一。我们给予它“必玩”评价，并写道：“在很长很长一段时间里，我将无法玩到任何能与《血源》的宏大视野、丰富内容——以及，没错——天才之处相媲美的游戏。”

title_en: Super Meat Boy Brings Brutal 3D Platforming To Switch 2 This Year
title_zh: 超级肉肉男孩今年将虐心3D平台跳跃带到Switch 2
summary_en:
"It's Meat Boy like never before".

If you've played any of the Super Meat Boy games previously, you might be interested to hear a brand-new 3D game is arriving in 2026.

In an update this week, developer Sluggerfly and the game's publisher Headup have now confirmed a Switch 2 version. While Super Meat Boy 3D does approach the brutal platforming action from a different perspective, the core gameplay remains intact.

Read the full article on nintendolife.com
summary_zh: 《超级肉肉哥》系列将推出一款全新的3D游戏，预计2026年问世。开发者Sluggerfly和发行商Headup本周确认，这款名为《超级肉肉哥3D》的新作将支持Switch 2平台。虽然游戏以不同视角呈现残酷的平台跳跃玩法，但其核心体验保持不变。这包括“残酷但公平的关卡”、Boss战以及黑暗世界关卡。游戏配乐将有死亡核乐队Despised Icon的Steve Marcois参与。玩家可以在相关视频中看到Switch 2上的扩展玩法演示。
full_text_en:
If you've played any of the Super Meat Boy games previously, you might be interested to hear a brand-new 3D game is arriving in 2026.

In an update this week, developer Sluggerfly and the game's publisher Headup have now confirmed a Switch 2 version. While Super Meat Boy 3D does approach the brutal platforming action from a different perspective, the core gameplay remains intact.

This includes "brutal, but fair levels", boss fights, Dark World levels, and a soundtrack with involvement from Steve Marcois of the deathcore band Despised Icon. Here's a bit more about this meaty new experience, and you can see some extended gameplay footage on Switch 2 in the video below.
full_text_zh:
如果你之前玩过任何一款《超级肉肉哥》游戏，你可能会有兴趣知道一款全新的3D游戏将于2026年面世。

在本周的一次更新中，开发商Sluggerfly和游戏发行商Headup现已确认将推出Switch 2版本。尽管《超级肉肉哥3D》以不同的视角呈现残酷的平台跳跃动作，但核心玩法保持不变。

这包括“残酷但公平的关卡”、Boss战、黑暗世界关卡，以及由死亡核乐队Despised Icon的Steve Marcois参与制作的原声音乐。关于这款“肉味十足”的新体验，这里还有更多信息，你可以在下方视频中看到一些Switch 2上的加长版实机演示。

title_en: Gallery: Here's A Look At Pokémon Winds & Waves On Switch 2
title_zh: 图集：Switch 2 版《宝可梦 风与浪》一览
summary_en:
Coming 2027.

As part of the 30th anniversary Pokémon celebrations, Game Freak this week lifted the lid on its new mainline game Pokémon Winds & Waves.

Read the full article on nintendolife.com
summary_zh: Game Freak在宝可梦30周年庆典上公布了新主线游戏《宝可梦：风与浪》。该作将于2027年独占登陆Switch 2，拥有一个全新的开放世界，玩家可以探索美丽的岛屿和广阔的海洋，并邂逅、捕捉和训练新的宝可梦。任天堂官方页面已发布了预告片和多张游戏截图。
full_text_en:
As part of the 30th anniversary Pokémon celebrations, Game Freak this week lifted the lid on its new mainline game Pokémon Winds & Waves.

This game is coming exclusively to the Switch 2 in 2027 and includes a new open world to explore as well as "beautiful windswept islands and a vast ocean with glittering waves". Of course, there are also new Pokémon to meet, catch and train along the way.

Alongside the reveal trailer, Nintendo's official game pages for this title have also shared some direct screenshots of the game. So here's a sample of what you can expect when this new generation of games arrives at some point next year.

Subscribe to Nintendo Life on YouTube843k

If you want to know more about Pokémon Winds & Waves, be sure to check out our other stories here on Nintendo Life. We've also got news related to Pokémon FireRed and LeafGreen and various other announcements from the latest Pokémon Presents broadcast.
full_text_zh:
作为宝可梦30周年庆典的一部分，Game Freak本周揭开了其全新正统续作《宝可梦 风与浪》的面纱。

这款游戏将于2027年独家登陆Switch 2，包含一个可供探索的全新开放世界，以及“风光秀丽的迎风岛屿和波光粼粼的浩瀚海洋”。当然，一路上还有新的宝可梦等你邂逅、捕捉和培养。

除了揭示预告片之外，任天堂为这款游戏开设的官方页面也分享了一些游戏截图。因此，当这一代新游戏在明年的某个时候到来时，以下是你可能会看到的一些示例。

在YouTube上订阅Nintendo Life 84.3万

如果你想了解更多关于《宝可梦 风与浪》的信息，请务必查看Nintendo Life上的其他报道。我们还有关于《宝可梦 火红》和《宝可梦 叶绿》的新闻，以及来自最新宝可梦发布会的其他各种公告。
